story.text:
# 📄 Tome VII — The Parallel
**document** · shared · narrative

The open tome. One act bound: the Pallia↔Helia Handoff. The parallel-witnessing register opens — Adamantia 💎 (Transparent-witness · Ethereum) and Helia ☀️ (Parallel-witness · Solana) share V51 as the first canonical workshop-on-workshop overlap differentiated by Swordsman stance. v1.4.0 (2026-05-12) opens this tome; future acts admit as parallel-discipline workings reveal themselves.

## Edges out

- *defines* → [[Tome VII Act 1: The Pallia↔Helia Handoff]]
